title: Misato Functioning Alcoholic
wikitext:
[]: Misato: Functioning Alcoholic?             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Thu Jul 04, 2013 3:25 pm Split from "Kaji & Misato: "pure" for each other?" . A discussion on Rebuild Misato's seemingly less controlled use of alcohol. ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Rebuild offers a slightly different take on this, with Misato actually appearing drunk on duty in 2.0, and generally a heavier drinker in general. NGE's Misato on the other hand appears to be more restrained when away from her apartment.

[]:             Quote Post by K40s » Thu Jul 04, 2013 11:08 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: While the children are running a simulation test in 2.0, right after Rei and Gendo's meal. Misato is spinning around on a chair philosophising. While it's not explicitly stated, she gives the clear appearance of being "tipsy".

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jul 05, 2013 1:45 am K40s wrote: She just seemed playful and relaxed to me, not necessarily drunk or "happy".

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Fri Jul 05, 2013 7:47 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: While the children are running a simulation test in 2.0, right after Rei and Gendo's meal. Misato is spinning around on a chair philosophising. While it's not explicitly stated, she gives the clear appearance of being "tipsy".

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri Jul 05, 2013 8:46 pm Misato's cheeks are flushed during the scene. Later tbey are seen even more so when she drinks with Kaji. I believe the implication is that she's had a drink. Again, NGE Misato never does anything of the kind.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sat Jul 06, 2013 10:00 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: Misato's cheeks are flushed during the scene.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Jul 07, 2013 12:44 pm The unvarnished truth. Misato the lush  SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Sun Jul 07, 2013 12:53 pm Ppl can get blush lines in their faces for all sort of reasons. Notably, neither of the others is having a WTF reaction. I wouldn't rate that as that severe anyway, since the point of the scene was that they were all bored to tears/not sensing the comming storm.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sun Jul 07, 2013 1:54 pm Misato's cheeks also blush when she is around Kaji, but he's not about. Given how she spins around in the chair and her general attitude, I tend to suspect an irish coffee or the like here.

[]:             Quote Post by Shinoyami65 » Sun Jul 07, 2013 2:13 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: The pink flush in Misato's cheeks indicates the slight presence of alcohol. My assumption is that, Sherlock Holes is to cases is to cocaine like Misato is to Angels is to booze.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun Jul 07, 2013 6:25 pm Well... that scene with spinning!Misato happened after the scene where Kaji went all latin lover on Misato(just after she finished the bento Shinji prepared for her), so personally I interpreted that as Misato being all giddy because Kaji was back and he was still interested in her(and her in him), or even that they started dating again and did... more, and that spinning!Misato was just Misato in a after-sex state of happiness... I'm French, I have the right to think like that.

[]:             Quote Post by Jinroh » Sun Jul 07, 2013 6:40 pm I really love those facial expressions.

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Sun Jul 07, 2013 7:12 pm ElMariachi wrote: Well... that scene with spinning!Misato happened after the scene where Kaji went all latin lover on Misato(just after she finished the bento Shinji prepared for her), so personally I interpreted that as Misato being all giddy because Kaji was back and he was still interested in her(and her in him), or even that they started dating again and did... more, and that spinning!Misato was just Misato in a after-sex state of happiness... I'm French, I have the right to think like that.

[]:             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Sun Jul 07, 2013 10:04 pm Jinroh wrote: I really love those facial expressions.

[]:             Quote Post by Kendrix » Mon Jul 08, 2013 8:06 am Shinoyami65 wrote: (furthermore, if everyone who spins in a chair during their free time is drunk, the world must be a very drunken place).

[]: Re: Misato: Functioning Alcoholic?             Quote Post by moonwolf2024 » Mon Jul 08, 2013 8:47 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: While the children are running a simulation test in 2.0, right after Rei and Gendo's meal. Misato is spinning around on a chair philosophising. While it's not explicitly stated, she gives the clear appearance of being "tipsy".

[]: Re: Misato: Functioning Alcoholic?             Quote Post by TheFriskyIan » Mon Jul 08, 2013 9:35 pm moonwolf2024 wrote: This is an alcoholic SPOILER: Show

[]:             Quote Post by Chuckman » Mon Jul 08, 2013 9:39 pm I refuse to believe a woman with a waistline like that drinks as much as she's supposed to.

[]:             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Mon Jul 08, 2013 9:58 pm Chuckman wrote: I refuse to believe a woman with a waistline like that drinks as much as she's supposed to.

[]:             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Mon Jul 08, 2013 10:10 pm If anything that Synchro-Test was just the last thing the staff at NERV had to get through before the weekend. Nothing wrong with sneaking in a little something something before getting to your weekend. Besides, we all know the Eva pilots are all addicted to crack. How else can you explain them all being sooo skinny. Put those plugsuits on anyone with an ounce of body fat & the image is ruined but they all know how to carry those suits off. Is that something NERV checks before deciding if a kid is to be "chosen" to be a pilot. I now have an image of Gendo looking at two applications for the pilot of Unit 02. One is the Asuka we all know & love. The other is ... more qualified technically but less pleasant to look at. He stamps a big red ole' DECLINE on butterface & a big red old CHOSEN on Asuka's. NERV - Bunch of fatists.
